title: sharpless pvp
description: Smooth, clean, boosted vanilla vibes. Better visibility, better gameplay, zero clutter and perfect for pvp. Grab it and dominate your fights
body:
## ⭐ sharpless pvp – Smooth & Clean Combat Textures

sharpless pvp is a sleek, minimalist texture pack made for players who take PvP seriously. Everything is smoothed out, colors are muted, and textures are simplified for ultimate clarity during fast gameplay. It keeps the visuals clean and distraction-free while giving you a slight edge in spotting ores, mobs, and enemies. Lightweight and performance-friendly, perfect for competitive or casual PvP.

## ✨ Features

🔥 Lower fire – never blocks your view

💎 Ore borders – spot diamonds instantly

⚔️ Short sword – better combat visibility

🧼 Smoother gameplay – clear, minimal, distraction-free

## 🔄 Updates

The pack is always updated to the latest Minecraft versions.
New features and improvements are added regularly.

Version format:
[x] v1.y.z

x – Minecraft version

y – major update

z – minor fixes

## 🗂️ Other Editions

Standard Edition: 👉 [Click here!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sharpless)

## 🔐 Permissions

❌ Don’t steal or re-upload

❌ Don’t modify and claim as your own

✔️ If you share it, always link back to the official page
